name: Eli
message: Girl I’m telling you every night I have to sit and see your updated. May God surround you with angels thru this journey!!! Be safe

name: Kee
message: Love the community you’re encountering! Glad you’re staying safe and sound!

name: Pam (Morgan's Mom)
message: I LOVE Cici's Pizza!!!  And Clingman's Dome!  (the old name for Kuwohi)  You're amazing Laura!  Stay safe!!
